inicio.sub-title: I build modern web applications with JavaScript, React and Node.js , applying best practices, scalable architecture and efficient problem solving.
inicio.competencias-01: Practical experience building real world applications such as MERN, SPAs, and REST APIs.
inicio.competencias-02: Focus on maintainable code, performance, and high adaptability.
inicio.disponiblidad: Open to work • Results oriented • Continuous learning

sombreMi.p: I am a developer with +3 years of experience, specialized in scalable and maintainable projects, which has allowed me to consolidate my logical and technical skills. I consider myself proactive, self-taught and always willing to learn, valuing feedback and teamwork. My goal is to grow professionally in roles such as Full Stack Developer, Frontend Developer, Backend Developer or Web Programmer, providing value through my commitment, dedication and adaptability.

habilidades.ts: JavaScript with static typing for better control.
habilidades.react: Library for building dynamic component based interfaces.
habilidades.express: NodeJS framework for fast servers and APIs.
habilidades.sqlite: Lightweight database ideal for simple projects.
habilidades.git: Manages versions and project code history.
habilidades.github: Hosts and collaborates on Git repositories.
habilidades.figma: Designs collaborative UI UX interfaces and prototypes.
